_summary: Cycle 9 closed this morning (121.5 SP). Six morning 'In Product' tickets cleared Mon/Tue — excellent throughput. Two tickets remain Blocked. Two new In Product tickets arrived today. Major people development: Jessica is in a formal consultation period (redundancy) — project/design continuity risk requires immediate action.

action_items.action: JESSICA CONSULTATION PERIOD — URGENT PEOPLE/PROJECT RISK. Jessica is in a formal redundancy consultation process (confirmed via DM exchange today). She is shocked and demotivated ('I feel lost'). Immediate actions: (1) Check with HR today re LinkedIn recommendation she requested — you said you need HR clearance first. (2) Confirm with Ciara that Jessica's local Figma drafts are being backed up NOW before any account removal — Ciara flagged the risk on 13/05. (3) Agree a clear work plan with Jessica for the consultation period — she moved GDCU-8902 to Product this morning and is actively working on GDCU-8906 (NL Tables), which is positive but her motivation is fragile. (4) Plan reassignment for her active tickets in case engagement drops. Consultation is ~1 month per DM exchange.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — STILL BLOCKED, NOW A LIVE INCIDENT. Ticket updated today at 12:22 but still Blocked/In QA (Day 9+). Shane flagged in #gdc-pod at 11:31 that ACE Football Tips are not showing for IE (La Liga games tonight). Carlos investigated and found tips not loading for IE at 11:47 — suspects cache issue. This is a live product issue affecting users ahead of tonight's games. Get a definitive status from Carlos/Sanja right now: is the original QA fix fully deployed? Is the IE cache issue a separate regression? Update the ticket and unblock QA.

WC PREDICTOR (GDCU-8935) — GET STATUS FROM MIGUEL TODAY. Design target was yesterday (13/05). Miguel's ticket updated this morning at 11:08 and is still 'In Progress'. Dev handoff is critical vs 11 June hard deadline. Scope: entry flow, 48-match group stage, knockout bracket, outrights, leaderboard, mobile-first at 3 breakpoints. If design is not on track, assess impact and update Chloe immediately as Cycle 10 planning begins.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS — DAY 9 BLOCKED. Still Blocked/In Progress, updated today at 10:57. No evidence the critical first step (contact RotoWire team re existing org accounts) has been completed. Ask Harden directly today: has RotoWire been contacted? If GDC Group org accounts already exist under RotoWire, this collapses the timeline from 6–8 weeks to ~1–2 weeks. App submission pipeline is otherwise ready (GDCU-8806 and GDCU-8936 both Done).

REVIEW GDCU-8902 Sports Quiz Design System Pressure Test (Jessica Dordevic, In Product, moved today at 10:57). NEW. Jessica moved this to In Product this morning and confirmed she worked on it. Task: UX audit of the Sports Quiz Vercel prototype (hungry-jepsen.vercel.app) to produce Claude Code prompts for dev iteration — not a Figma doc. Ciara gave initial positive feedback but hasn't formally confirmed. Mike's review needed today. A clear, prompt review will also support Jessica's engagement during a difficult time.

REVIEW GDCU-8971 Cosmo Spins How-To Videos (Novica Vukobratovic, In Product, updated today at 11:11). NEW since morning report. Novica has created knowledge-sharing videos documenting how to reskin Cosmo Spins game and banners for the dev team — enabling the wider team to complete the WC reskin (GDCU-8392). Stakeholders: Eoin McCarthy, Joshua Smith, Gabriel Cornoiu, Kelvin Yee. Review and approve to unlock these as team resources.

CYCLE 9 CLOSED / CYCLE 10 STARTING. Chloe announced Cycle 9 closed at 10:51 with 121.5 SP completed. Cycle 10 is beginning. Confirm sprint priorities are correctly loaded, especially: WC Predictor dev handoff, Group Bets KO call, and any replanning needed due to Jessica's situation. Note: Chloe asked in #gdc-product-design-pod about GDCU-8972 (Claude Design placeholder) — you confirmed 2 SPs, does not need to be in planning (Ciara to define reqs from stakeholder feedback).

WC COSMO SPINS RESKIN (GDCU-8392) — CIARA ACTIVELY IN PROGRESS. Positive update: Ciara is now assigned and In Progress (updated today 10:57). Morning risk of this ticket being unstaffed is resolved. Monitor timeline vs 11 June — full scope is significant (symbols, animations, 3 audio tracks, background, frames, countdown clock, menu animation, banners). Check in with Ciara mid-week on progress.

JESSICA FIGMA FILES — BACK UP NOW. Ciara flagged in DM on 13/05 that Jessica's Figma drafts are in local files and may be lost if her account is removed. You confirmed she is in a ~1-month consultation period, so time exists — but action should happen now. Confirm with Ciara today that files are being moved from Jessica's local drafts to a shared Figma space before any account changes.

PRIZE WHEEL QA vs PROD DISCREPANCY. You flagged in #gdc-pod at 09:00 on 13/05 that IUJ prize wheel slices are editable in QA admin panel (qa.gambling.com/admin/game-config/wheel-slices) but that interface is missing in Prod. No resolution seen. Follow up with the dev team today — is this a production permissions issue or a missing deployment?

NL PAYSAFECARD 404 — HIGH TRAFFIC URL. Robin John flagged in #gdc-pod this morning that gambling.com/nl/paysafecard is returning a 404 and is in the top 50 high-traffic URLs. Needs a redirect decision: to NL homepage or a relevant NL payment methods page. Live SEO and UX issue. Confirm who is actioning this and ensure a ticket is raised if not already done.

VIC DADSON — RETURNING TO WORK. Vic had her reintroduction call with you Monday 12/05 at 4PM. Colin confirmed she seemed OK. Agree her data engineering plan for Cycle 10: specifically loop in Nemanja (Data Engineering) per your 23/04 message — clear requirements and knowledge sharing to reduce Vic's pain points.
LIAM CAFFREY INTERVIEW — Today 12–3pm was the confirmed slot. Confirm interview took place and note follow-up actions: feedback to Gabriel Cornoiu, next steps in Greenhouse.

GROUP BETS — STATUS STILL UNCLEAR. Morning report flagged design target was 07/05. No confirmation in any channel this week. With Cycle 10 now starting, clarify with Miguel/Chloe: is design done? If yes, schedule KO call with Chloe and dev team. 11 June deadline unchanged.
DUPLICATE PAYMENT METHODS (Icelandic EN) — Carried from morning report. Chloe raised 08/05 and asked Sanja to create a ticket. Verify the ticket exists, is assigned, and prioritised.
